Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class ActivitiesSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.ActivitiesSettings2
public class ActivitiesSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for ActivitiesSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ActivitiesSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AllowUsersToRelateMultipleContactsToTasksAndEvents" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AutoRelateEventAttendees" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsActivityRemindersEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCalendarHomeLwcEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsClickCreateEventsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDragAndDropSchedulingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEmailTrackingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlowTaskNotifsViaApexEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsGroupTasksEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsHideChildEventsPreferenceEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsListViewSchedulingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsLogNoteEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsMlSingleClientProfileEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsMultidayEventsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRecurringEventsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRecurringTasksEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRollUpActivToContactsAcctEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSidebarCalendarShortcutEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSimpleTaskCreateUiEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsTimelineCompDateSortEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsUnsTaskDelegatedToNotificationsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsUserListViewCalendarsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MeetingRequestsLogo" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ActivitiesSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShowCustomLogoMeetingRequests" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShowEventDetailsMultiUserCalendar" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShowHomePageHoverLinksForEvents" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShowMyTasksHoverLinks" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
